name: workflow-kit
description: Workflow plugin for autonomous end-to-end execution patterns such as autopilot delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable execution workflows for autonomous multi-phase delivery.
interface.longDescription: Provides workflow skills that help Codex execute larger tasks end-to-end with scoped phases, verification, QA loops, and delivery handoff.
defaultPrompt: Run this feature request end-to-end with autopilot.
Split these independent tasks into safe parallel work and integrate the result.
Take this brief from implementation through verification.
Handle this task autonomously and report the final status.
